text:
The Gold Dust Girl (, Kinpun Shōjo) is a non-player character (NPC) of the Greed Island game, who sheds gold dust from her body. 500g of gold can be harvested from her daily bath. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 150 

Appearance

The Gold Dust Girl is a girl of petite size; she has big, dead fish-like eyes, no visible nose, and wears her hair in two balls held by two scrunchies. She wears a simple dress. 

Personality

She is timid and rarely leaves the house. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Killua rescues her from a hidden room in the 4th-floor basement in a trap-filled mansion. The moment she's brought outside, she turns into the specified slot card #46. 

Soon after Gon and Biscuit enter the trap-filled mansion and locate the room the Gold Dust girl was locked in, she apparently respawns there again. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 151 

Card

The "Gold Dust Girl" card is an A-rank restricted slot card with a 13-card limit. Its designated number is 46. It can be obtained once the girl is found.
